original_image_tags: A yellow manila document envelope or folder flap, oriented vertically. Two punched holes are visible at the top edge. A clear plastic fastener or label holder is affixed near the bottom center.

elements.description: Back of a manila folder or envelope. Two punch holes at the top. Handwritten text on the right reads 'Nothing on carrier before reported 1-20-78'. Handwritten text at the bottom reads '62-83894-349'. A vertical stamp reads 'ENCLOSURE' in red ink.

judge.reason: Description B invents specific handwritten text and a red stamp that are not mentioned in Description A, indicating a factual contradiction on visual content.
